calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Off Calendar

Quiet Title- Real Property In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Quiet Title-Real Propery Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Peter L. Ryan, Esq. for Plaintiff: Michael Lanza, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: ALL PERSONS claiming any interest in, or lien upon, the real property.
See details of Judgment Quieting Title in scanned doc.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Continued To Aug-04-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-04-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title In Scd. Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Leland Peter Ryan, Esq. for Plaintiff: Michael Lanza, present, was sworn.
Counsel requested for matter to be taken off calendar.
